guidance: Cover coughs and sneezes, improve ventilation when feasible, and stay home when acutely ill to reduce respiratory infection spread.
People with diabetes should have an individualized sick-day plan for glucose monitoring, hydration, medications, and when to seek urgent care.
Clean, separate, cook, and chill food appropriately to reduce foodborne illness risk.
Medication review, vision care, strength and balance activity, and home hazard reduction can lower fall risk in older adults.
